verses.text: Topa' thupiak bangin Israel mihon khempeuh Sin sehnel gam panin giahphual a ban banin sat uh a, Refidim-ah phual sat uh hi. Ahih hangin mite' dawn ding tui omlo hi

Tua ahih ciangin mite in Moses' tungah mawhna zong uh a, “Tui dawn ding hong pia in,” ci uh hi. Moses in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin kei' tungah mawhna hong zong na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin Topa ze-et na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi

Ahi zongin tua munah tui duhin mite dangtak uh a, Moses' tungah mite phunin, “Kote leh ka tate uh leh ka ganhingte uh dangtakin a si dingin bang hangin Egypt panin hong paipih to na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa' tungah Moses kiko a, “Hih mite bang cih ding ka hi hiam? Suang tawh kei hong deng dingin amaute kithawi uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel upate pawlkhat samin mite' mai-ah pai in. Nail na satna ciangkhut na khutin tawi-in pai in

En in, Horeb-a suangpi-ah nangma mai-ah ka ding ding hi. Nang in suangpi na sat ding a, mite in tui a dawn theihna dingin tua suang sung panin tui hong phulkhia ding hi,” a ci hi. Israel upate' muhna-ah tua bangmahin Moses gamta hi
Israel mite' mawhzon'na leh amaute in Topa ze-etin, “Eite' lakah Topa a om mah ahi hiam?” a cihna hangun, tua mun pen Massah leh Meribah, ci-in min kiphuak hi.
Tua ciangin Amalek mite hong pai-in Israel mite tawh Refidim-ah kido uh hi
Moses in Joshua kiangah, “Eite-a' dingin mi teel in la, pai-in Amalek mite tawh kido in. Zing ciangin, Pasian in ka tawi dingin a hong sawl ciangkhut tawi-in mual dawnah ka ding ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in ama tungah a gen bangin Joshua gamta a, Amalek mite tawh kido uh hi. Moses, Aaron, leh Hur-te mual dawnah paito uh hi
Moses in a khut a san'sak lai teng Israel mite in neh a, a khut a niamsak ciangin Amalek mite in neh hi

Ahih hangin Moses a khut kham hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in suangtum khat la-in ama nuai-ah koih uh a, tua suang tungah amah tu a, Aaron leh Hur in a pang khat tuak panin ama khutte len uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin nitum mateng ama khutte kip hi
Joshua in Amalek leh ama mite namsau tawh vatmai hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Keimah in mun khempeuh panin Amalek mite ka phiat siangthona ding thu phawkna dingin hih thu laibu sung khatah gelh in la, Joshua kiangah hih thu gen kik in,” a ci hi
Moses in biakna tau khat lamin a min dingin, “ Topa, keima zawhna lim ahi hi,” ci-in phuak a
“ Topa' dial sang tawi un! Topa in a khang khangin Amalek mite do ding hi,” a ci hi.
